description_long: This object is an irregularly shaped stone with a low, elongated profile and a slightly raised, rounded mound on one side. Its surface is rough and uneven, with subtle undulations and a matte finish, suggesting natural weathering. The coloration is predominantly a muted gray with hints of brown and faint reddish undertones, giving it an earthy appearance. The stone appears solid and dense, with no visible cavities or artificial modifications. Its form is asymmetrical, with one end tapering to a thinner edge while the other is broader and more substantial. Such a stone could serve as a minor obstacle or decorative element in an urban park, sidewalk, or landscaped area.
description: An irregular, rough-textured gray stone with a low profile and a single raised mound, showing natural weathering and earthy tones.
description_view_0: The stone is seen from an angle highlighting its elongated shape and the prominent raised mound on the right side.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the stone's low height and the gentle slope leading up to the rounded mound.
description_view_2: From this perspective, the stone's asymmetrical outline and the broad, flat surface are most visible.
description_view_3: This view shows the stone's thin, tapered edge and the subtle color variations across its surface.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle mottling and natural irregularities, with no artificial carvings or regular veining.
attribute_weathering: Rough and slightly eroded, with minor surface pitting indicating exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil and vegetation, providing a subtle contrast to paved surfaces or manicured lawns.
